headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 6, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a shutout victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Shane McClanahan earning the win after 5.2 innings of scoreless relief. Ian Seymour closed out the game with a save. The Milwaukee Brewers also secured a win, taking down the St. Louis Cardinals 6-2 behind Andrew Vaughn's 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. The Los Angeles Dodgers cruised to a 12-2 victory over the Houston Astros, with Andy Pages hitting three home runs and driving in six runs. The San Diego Padres secured a 5-1 victory over the San Francisco Giants, with Xander Bogaerts leading the offense.

Several players have been impacted by injuries, including Chicago Cubs left-handed pitcher Matthew Boyd, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left meniscus injury. Other injured players include Cincinnati Reds' Emilio Pagán (left hamstring strain), Brandon Williamson (left shoulder fatigue), Detroit Tigers' Gleyber Torres (left oblique strain), Houston Astros' Carlos Correa (left ankle tendon injury), Chicago White Sox' Drew Thorpe (Tommy John surgery), San Diego Padres' Jake Cronenworth (concussion symptoms), and Houston Astros' Yainer Diaz (left oblique strain).

The Tampa Bay Rays made a roster move ahead of a weekend series, trading RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash. The Chicago White Sox acquired RHP Trevor Richards from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash, while the Atlanta Braves traded C Jonah Heim to the Athletics for cash. The Detroit Tigers acquired 3B Zack Short from the Washington Nationals for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Out Blue Jays 3-0**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a shutout victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Shane McClanahan earning the win after 5.2 innings of scoreless relief. Ian Seymour closed out the game with a save.

top_news.title: **Brewers Take Down Cardinals 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-2 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, with Andrew Vaughn leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. Aaron Ashby earned the win for the Brewers.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Blast Astros 12-2 in Dominant Performance**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers cruised to a 12-2 victory over the Houston Astros, behind a historic night from Andy Pages. Pages hit three home runs and drove in six runs, including a key eighth-inning homer to left field.

top_news.title: **Padres Take Down Giants 5-1**
top_news.summary: The San Diego Padres secured a 5-1 victory over the San Francisco Giants, with Xander Bogaerts leading the offense. Bogaerts hit a 7th-inning home run, scoring Manny Machado.

top_news.title: **Cubs' Matthew Boyd Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Chicago Cubs left-handed pitcher Matthew Boyd has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left meniscus injury, effective retroactive to May 4, 2026.

top_news.title: **Rays Make Roster Move Ahead of Weekend Series**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays traded RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash on May 6, 2026.
